headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk if risk perception worsens and cost of capital rises — Fast growth in mid-sized banks like IDFC First Bank raises risk profile, sustaining low valuations and regulatory scrutiny
what_matters: Risk of P/E compression and margin erosion as investors price in higher risk; revenue at risk is not directly quantifiable.
BRSR, TCFD, COSO ERM, ISSB/IFRS S1 S2 frameworks triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions if disclosures lag.
Potential for higher cost of capital and bond spreads due to perceived risk and possible FII outflows.
